title: Super Cool Totems
description: Super cool totems is a resource pack that uses custom model data to add totem versions of some cool people :D
body:
This is a resource pack that adds 9 new totem textures using custom model data. Each totem is a totem version of a person's skin, here are all the options, and their custom model data ids:

- BitSquidd - 1
- KingPizzaPants - 2
- LynxyLiam - 3
- PrettyPrivilage (MC) - 4
- PrettyPrivilage (OC) - 5
- BenTechMC - 6
- Adryatic - 7
- SiennaIsHere - 8
- DiaDuckk - 9

To obtain the totem just use this command, but instead of the X use the id of the totem you want:

**/give @s minecraft:totem_of_undying{CustomModelData:X}**

Compatible with all versions that support CustomModelData!
